text:
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 

FILE(S): LT header 

OT header 

VALUES: 0 = Not substance use diagnosis (SUD) claim 
1 = SUD claim 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is derived in the TAF using ICD-9 diagnosis codes 303–305 and ICD-10 diagnosis codes 
F10–F19 to identify substance use-related claims.
